question: In each of the fiscal years of 2018-19, 2019-20, and 2020-21, which five counties submitted their reports the latest? Then consider all counties that appear in the three years, and define a good hospital is one with as low mortality rate as possible under the condition of having at least 2 'Better' ratings. With such definition, find the top 50 best hospitals, and among all those counties in the three years, which county has at least one hospital in the top 50 hospital list? In that county, in which year was the all-cause unexpectedly 30-day rehospitalized rate the 4th lowest? In the school year starting in that year in New York, define an acceptable school as one with zero major crimes and zero violent crimes. Among all acceptable schools, which 10 schools have the highest number of non-criminal incidents, breaking ties alphabetically? Rank all New York schools by the number of AP scores 3 and 3+ divided by total exams taken in 2010. For all those ten schools, what is their best statewide rank? Please return only the number in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/counties-that-filed-late-or-failed-to-file-fy-2018-19-ftrs-edcdb/files/rows.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

df["County"] = df["County"].fillna("").str.strip()
df["Date Report Submitted"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date Report Submitted"], errors="coerce")
ranked = df.sort_values(["Date Report Submitted", "County"], ascending=[False, True], kind="mergesort").reset_index(drop=True)
answer = ", ".join(ranked.head(5)["County"].tolist())
1.subquestion: In the fiscal year of 2018-19, which five counties submitted their financial transactions reports the latest?

4.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/california-hospital-inpatient-mortality-rates-and-quality-ratings-63b1a/files/imi_gis_long_2022.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

node_1_answer = "Tuolumne, Humboldt, Mendocino, Inyo, Yuba"
node_2_answer = "Humboldt, Inyo, Tuolumne, Mendocino, Yuba"
node_3_answer = "Humboldt, Mendocino, Lassen, Tuolumne, Inyo"
all_counties = []
for value in [node_1_answer, node_2_answer, node_3_answer]:
    all_counties.extend([part.strip() for part in str(value).split(",") if part.strip()])
target_counties = sorted(set(all_counties))

df["COUNTY"] = df["COUNTY"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["HOSPITAL"] = df["HOSPITAL"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["Hospital Ratings"] = df["Hospital Ratings"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["mort_num"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Risk Adjuested Mortality Rate"].astype(str).str.extract(r"([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)", expand=False), errors="coerce")
filtered = df[df["Hospital Ratings"].eq("Better") & df["mort_num"].notna()].copy()
ranked_hospitals = filtered.groupby(["COUNTY", "HOSPITAL"], as_index=False).agg(
    avg_mort=("mort_num", "mean"),
    better_rows=("Hospital Ratings", "size")
)
ranked_hospitals = ranked_hospitals[ranked_hospitals["better_rows"].ge(2)].copy()
ranked_hospitals = ranked_hospitals.sort_values(
    ["avg_mort", "better_rows", "COUNTY", "HOSPITAL"],
    ascending=[True, False, True, True],
    kind="mergesort"
).reset_index(drop=True)
top50 = ranked_hospitals.head(50).copy()
answer = ", ".join(sorted(top50[top50["COUNTY"].isin(target_counties)]["COUNTY"].drop_duplicates().tolist()))
4.subquestion: Define a good hospital is one with as low mortality rate as possible under the condition of having at least 2 'Better' ratings. With such definition, find the top 50 best hospitals in the whole state and among all countries of <node_1 answer>, <node_2 answer>, and <node_3 answer>, which countries have at least one hospital in the top 50 hospital list?

5.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/all-cause-unplanned-30-day-hospital-readmission-rate-california-lghc-indicator-36e12/files/allcauseunplanned30-dayhospitalreadmissionratecalifornia2011_2022.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

df.columns = [str(c).replace("\n", " ").strip() for c in df.columns]
node_4_answer = "Tuolumne"
filtered = df[df["County"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip().eq(str(node_4_answer).strip())].copy()
for col in ["30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-9)", "30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-10)"]:
    filtered[col] = pd.to_numeric(filtered[col].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False), errors="coerce")
filtered["rate"] = filtered["30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-9)"].fillna(filtered["30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-10)"])
filtered["Year_num"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["Year"], errors="coerce")
ranked = filtered.sort_values(["rate", "Year_num"], ascending=[True, True], kind="mergesort").reset_index(drop=True)
answer = str(ranked.iloc[3]["Year"])
5.subquestion: In <node_4 answer>, in which year was the all-cause unexpectedly 30-day rehospitalized rate the 4th lowest?

6.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/2010-2016-school-safety-report/files/rows.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

node_5_answer = "2014"
df["School Year"] = df["School Year"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["DBN"] = df["DBN"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["Location Name"] = df["Location Name"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
for col in ["Major N", "Vio N", "NoCrim N"]:
    df[col] = df[col].replace({"N/A": None, "#N/A": None, "": None})
    df[col + "_num"] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors="coerce")

target_school_year = f"{int(str(node_5_answer).strip())}-{str(int(str(node_5_answer).strip()) + 1)[-2:]}"
filtered = df[
    df["School Year"].eq(target_school_year)
    & df["DBN"].ne("")
    & df["Major N_num"].eq(0)
    & df["Vio N_num"].eq(0)
    & df["NoCrim N_num"].notna()
].copy()
ranked = filtered.sort_values(["NoCrim N_num", "Location Name", "DBN"], ascending=[False, True, True], kind="mergesort").reset_index(drop=True)
answer = ", ".join(ranked.head(10)["Location Name"].tolist())
6.subquestion: In the school year starting in <node_5 answer>, define an acceptable school as one with zero major crimes and zero violent crimes. Among all acceptable schools, which 10 schools have the highest number of non-criminal incidents, breaking ties alphabetically?
6.answer: Bronx High School of Science, Edward A. Reynolds West Side High School, High School of Telecommunication Arts and Technol, In-Tech Academy (M.S. / High School 368), Liberation Diploma Plus, P.S. 036 Margaret Douglas, J.H.S. 220 John J. Pershing, P.S. 106 Parkchester, P.S. 284 Lew Wallace, P186X Walter J. Damrosch School

import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/2010-ap-college-board-school-level-results/files/rows.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

node_6_answer = "Bronx High School of Science, Edward A. Reynolds West Side High School, High School of  Telecommunication Arts and Technol, In-Tech Academy (M.S. / High School 368), Liberation Diploma Plus, P.S. 036 Margaret Douglas, J.H.S. 220 John J. Pershing, P.S. 106 Parkchester, P.S. 284 Lew Wallace, P186X Walter J. Damrosch School"
target_schools = [part.strip() for part in str(node_6_answer).split(",") if part.strip()]
dbn_map = {
    "Bronx High School of Science": "10X445",
    "Edward A. Reynolds West Side High School": "03M505",
    "High School of  Telecommunication Arts and Technol": "20K485",
    "In-Tech Academy (M.S. / High School 368)": "10X368",
    "Liberation Diploma Plus": "21K728",
    "P.S. 036 Margaret Douglas": "05M036",
    "J.H.S. 220 John J. Pershing": "20K220",
    "P.S. 106 Parkchester": "11X106",
    "P.S. 284 Lew Wallace": "23K284",
    "P186X Walter J. Damrosch School": "75X186",
}
records = pd.DataFrame([{"canonical_name": name, "DBN": dbn_map[name]} for name in target_schools if name in dbn_map])

df["DBN"] = df["DBN"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["SchoolName"] = df["SchoolName"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
for col in ["Total Exams Taken", "Number of Exams with scores 3 4 or 5"]:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col].astype(str).str.replace(",", "", regex=False), errors="coerce")
filtered = df[(df["DBN"].ne("")) & df["Total Exams Taken"].notna() & df["Number of Exams with scores 3 4 or 5"].notna() & df["Total Exams Taken"].gt(0)].copy()
filtered["quality"] = filtered["Number of Exams with scores 3 4 or 5"] / filtered["Total Exams Taken"]
ranked = filtered.sort_values(["quality", "SchoolName", "DBN"], ascending=[False, True, True], kind="mergesort").reset_index(drop=True)
ranked["rank"] = range(1, len(ranked) + 1)
merged = records.merge(ranked[["DBN", "rank"]], on="DBN", how="left")
answer = str(int(merged["rank"].min()))
